About Organization

Airports Authority of India (AAI) is a government organization responsible for managing and maintaining airports in India.

AAI works under the Ministry of Civil Aviation and is headquartered in New Delhi.


About the Programme

The AAI Manager, Junior Executive Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for various posts in AAI, including Manager and Junior Executive positions.
